name: fengling
description: Mac-native Fengling CLI, backend, and Codex skill for Suno recut upload/render automation.

interface.shortDescription: Run the migrated Fengling Suno workflow from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Fengling packages the Mac-native CLI source, local backend, and Codex skill for running the migrated Suno recut, upload, Studio assembly, render, and cleanup workflow. It includes first-run dependency guidance, OpenCLI browser login reuse, and cleanup rules for intermediate Suno Library clips.
defaultPrompt: Use Fengling to run a Suno recut.
Check Fengling setup on this Mac.
